title: fragaria vesca subsp. vesca
intro: Fragaria vesca subsp. vesca, also known as wild strawberry or Alpine strawberry, is a type of strawberry plant that is native to the Northern Hemisphere. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The leaves and roots of Fragaria vesca subsp. vesca have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and wounds, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting healthy digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
